evidence: Google snippet will show stylesheet comment text instead of a description.

title: COE results pages: live '$XXX,XXX' placeholders, stale tooltips reused across months, duplicate archive row, 'Bids 0' with settled premiums, date anomalies
evidence: Slider caption 'See $XXX,XXX update'; April/May tooltips show June values; archive lists 17 June 2nd twice (13 rounds YTD); May 1st headline says motorcycles falling while Cat D card shows rise; Updated dates precede the round; 2020 archive rows render as bare commas.

title: Tag/section post counts disagree with rendered cards; /guides/ and /car-tips/ show the whole blog mislabelled
evidence: Header pill counts (e.g. '9 posts', '20 posts') differ from cards rendered; guides/car-tips list every blog post under the wrong section label.

title: Internal reference to 'Ed' published in body copy
evidence: '...this is legally incorrect and Ed has seen it used to press...' shipped to readers.

title: Same-page and cross-page numeric contradictions on money pages
evidence: NCD scale 0% vs 10%; OAW definition inverted; labour-rate and markup ranges disagree across pages; warranty 6 vs 12 months; '120-point in five areas' lists six; GVP 'doubles' $40->$70; loan example uses disallowed tenure; payment methods differ Terms vs FAQ; Subaru CCCS year 2017 vs Feb 2024; Cupra 'replaced SEAT entirely' vs SEAT still serviced.

evidence: Repeats identically across all 35 brand pages; also 'useven' on brands-we-service hero.

title: Comparison table third column unreadable at 390px, no scroll cue
evidence: 'Authorised dealer' column clipped to 1-3 chars per line; template reused across service pages.
